text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Damn. This site's sold out too.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Should I just give up and get a new model? Nah, screw that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Who makes a new model with worse performance? What a load of crap.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'll have to hit the pavement.
...Freakin' pain in my ass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's favorite headphones broke, so she's
forced to go hunting for an exact replacement.
